title: hieracium mougeotii subsp. doronicoides
intro: Hieracium mougeotii subsp. doronicoides, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Hieracium mougeotii subsp. doronicoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments, although its effectiveness and safety need further research and validation.
